description:
Track and evaluate the performance of your investment portfolio across stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets.


- New: View for the price update status.
- New: Configure which instruments should be updated after opening the file and periodically.
- New: Menu to update only the prices of currently held securities.
- New: Daily performance bars in the chart now use different colors for gains and losses.
- New: Savings plans now also support taxes for regular security purchases.
- New: Bulk import and export of classifications is supported.
- Improvement: When importing classifications, categories not present in the import can be removed.
- Improvement: When exporting classifications, the color of the root category is now also exported.
- Improvement: HTML import now ignores spaces in numbers that previously prevented parsing.
- Improvement: JSON price provider no longer fails if a price for a day is unreadable.
- Improvement: PDF imports have been updated for N26, Scalable Capital, Quirin Privatbank, KFintech, Trade Republic, and Flatex.
- Fix: Wrong exchange rate suggestions for bookings in foreign currencies are corrected.
- Fix: Corrupted bookings no longer prevent files from opening.
